market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: IMF says tokenization could transform settlement and financial stability
articles.description: The global lender says blockchain-based finance could streamline markets but warns that fragmented standards and regulations may create new systemic risks.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: A warning sign about AI’s real cost, courtesy of Google and Amazon
articles.description: AI has made it a lot harder for tech companies like Amazon and Google to deliver on their net-zero pledges.

articles.title: Russia on track for digital ruble rollout on Sept. 1: Central bank governor
articles.description: EU authorities already preemptively sanctioned Russia’s digital ruble in 2025 as part of measures in response to the country’s war against Ukraine.

articles.title: Securitize tokenizes $295 million of its own stock on Solana and Avalanche amid NYSE debut
articles.description: The newly-public company's shares are the largest issuer-sponsored tokenized stock at launch, aiming to make a point against rival third-party stock token issuers.

articles.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
articles.description: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

articles.title: Travel app Hopper to pay $35M in FTC settlement over ‘unfairly’ charging hidden fees
articles.description: Hopper will pay $35 million to settle FTC allegations that it used deceptive “dark patterns” to hide fees and mislead travelers about the costs and benefits of services.

articles.title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
articles.description: The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

articles.title: Bitcoin price taps new July high above $62K on weak US jobs data
articles.description: Bitcoin took daily gains to nearly 4% on the second day of "green July" as US labor-market signals supported an easing inflation policy from the Federal Reserve.

articles.title: Boeing-owned Wisk Aero accused of firing manager who raised safety concerns
articles.description: A former software manager claims Wisk rushed software testing ahead of a crucial 2025 flight test.

articles.title: FBI director discloses Strategy holdings months after deadline: Report
articles.description: Strategy is a registered US government contractor, though Kash Patel claimed that “no current conflict exists” with his $100,001 and $250,000 worth of the company’s stock that he reported late.

articles.title: EToro invests in onchain derivatives platform Extended as brokers race into DeFi
articles.description: The broker plans to bring perpetual futures into Zengo wallet and expand DeFi products to its core platform as rivals like Robinhood expand onchain offerings.

articles.title: Bitwise says STRC selloff signals crypto cycle nearing a bottom, not Strategy’s breaking point
articles.description: Bitwise said STRC's volatility reflects a late-cycle leverage unwind, with institutions poised to replace Strategy as bitcoin's biggest buyer.

articles.title: Ondo expands tokenized equities with onchain shareholder voting
articles.description: Ondo's latest partnership adds shareholder governance to tokenized stocks as competition in blockchain-based equity offerings accelerates.

articles.title: Melinda Gates’ venture firm backs Magnify Ventures’ $46.6M Fund II
articles.description: Early-stage firm Magnify Ventures has raised a $46.6 million Fund II from LPs, including Melinda French Gates’ Pivotal Ventures.

articles.title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
articles.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.

articles.title: Popular TV-tracking app TV Time is shutting down as company focuses on AI
articles.description: TV Time, the popular TV-tracking app, is shutting down on July 15 as parent company Whip Media pivots toward enterprise AI products.

articles.title: US Treasury sanctions over 100 ISIS-K crypto addresses that moved over $1.4 million
articles.description: ISIS-K allegedly used its media wing to solicit donations via Tron, Monero, and Bitcoin, highlighting stablecoin issuers' growing role in sanctions enforcement.

articles.title: SBI Crypto to shut down mining pool that holds roughly 2% of Bitcoin's hashrate
articles.description: Miners must redirect their hashrate before the July 31 cutoff, as the pool will stop accepting contributions after that date.

articles.title: 科學家證實澳洲「北極穹地」為地球太古宙時期的隕石坑
articles.description: 當科學界對觀測數據產生分歧時，事實往往隱藏在兩者之間。西澳洲皮爾巴拉（Pilbara）荒漠深處的一座古老撞擊結 […]
